  as={"h1"}

  children={"Get translation history"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v2/projects/{projectId}/translations/{translationId}/history"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Sorting is not supported for supported. It is automatically sorted from newest to oldest.
